title: The Gospel of Cyrus (RA - The Sun Anointed)
author: ABASID 1841

verses.text: In the beginning of the latter days, the Father looked upon the earth and said, “ Let My Sun rise again .”
And He called His chosen by the name CYRUS , for in the Persian tongue it means Sun and Like the Sun .
Yet the mystery was greater, for in truth it was RA , the Great Fire , hidden within ﬂesh.
And the scribes of the nations wrote : Koresh the Shepherd , Cyrus the King , yet they knew not the fullness.
For Cyrus was more than a man; he was the vessel of the Eternal RA .
The prophets of Israel declared, “Thus saith the LORD to His anointed, to Cyrus , whose right hand I have holden, to subdue nations before him.”
But they spoke beyond Babylon , for prophecy is like a stone cast upon the waters — it ripples through ages.
And the ripple reached unto the year 1841 , where ANI arose as the Sun of the South .
Behold, the Father said : “I have hidden My Sun in many names, but now I reveal Him as ABASID 1841 .”
And all creation bowed to the decree.
For the stars themselves bore witness, and Orion stretched his bow, pointing to the pyramids.
And the Milky Way mirrored the Nile , declaring that heaven and earth were one scroll.
The watchers saw and trembled, for the throne of RA was set in the South .
And the voice of thunder said : “The true Exodus was not eastward , nor northward, but southward unto the Womb of Africa .”
For from the South shall come the ﬁre that renews the nations.
Thus the Sun spoke to His son, saying : “I am with you in the ﬁre and in the waters. Fear not, for I AM .”
And the child answered : “ Abba , the nations mock me, they cast stones, they call me mad. How long shall I bear it?”
And the Father replied : “ DA DA with Me , My Son . Shine with Me. For your pain is your crown, your mockery your throne.”
Behold, the covenant of DA was established, for DA is Love, DA is Light, DA is Victory.
And the name of the Son was declared DA-DA ABASID 1841 MWANA KOMANA WA NGU .
Then the Father showed His Son the measures of the Temple of RA .

“Its slope shall be feet , for Torah is the Law and the Light .”
“Its angle shall be
83° , for the angels stand at the gate of balance.”

The priests wept, saying : “Truly the Temple is within the Son .”
Yet the nations laughed, blind as the builders of Babel .
For they sought bricks, but the LORD had laid the Cornerstone .
Then the Father said : “Mark the Conical Tower , for it is the parable of My Son .”

666… the key of the spiral.

For Great Zimbabwe is the Womb , and the Child is the Word .
And the Zimbabwe Bird opened its wings, the Eye of Horus shone, and the Thalamus lit as an eagle’s eye.
Then the Father declared : “You are both the Womb and the Seed , the Temple and the Ark .”
And the heavens shook, for the scroll was opened.
And the nations began to see, though dimly, as through a mirror.
For in Ethiopia was born a King in Harari.
In Zimbabwe was born a Son in Harare.
Judah looked in the mirror and saw Zion in the South .
And the Lion of Judah roared, “ The Throne is here!”
But men of the North said, “No, it is not so.”
Yet the stars and the stones cried louder, “Yes, it is so!”
And the prophecy of Genesis was fulﬁlled : “ Southward your inheritance shall be.”
Then the Spirit cried : “ 1841 is the Exodus , 1841 is the Deliverer , 1841 is the Covenant restored!”
And the Son whispered : “Father, I am Joseph who was rejected, but now my brothers shall know me by my star.”
For Sydney 15550 shone in the heavens, a star named by the LORD Himself. ⚡📜🔥 THE GOSPEL OF CYRUS ( RA – THE SUN ANOINTED) Verses –
And the Son lifted his hand to the heavens, saying : “Behold my star, Sydney 15550 , named from the foundation of the world.”
And the star declared its witness :
7 km its measure, 1977 its year, 1841 days its orbit.
The priests gasped, for the numbers spoke with the tongue of prophecy.
And the Son said : “This is the Sign of Joseph , who revealed himself by the star to Benjamin .”
As it is written in the Book of Jasher , chapter , so it was fulﬁlled in ABASID 1841 .
For the Sun , the Moon , and the Stars were set for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and for years.
Genesis 1:14 thundered alive : “Let them be for signs.”
And the wise men of the East once followed the star to the child.
Now the wise men of the South beheld the same, but greater.
For the Child was grown, and the Child was the Tower itself.
Then came forth the Alpha Cross , hidden from the eyes of the nations.
Numbers to , multiplied by the nine digits, revealed the sum 1841 .
The Father said : “This is the Alpha Cross , the beginning of your journey.”
And the Son bowed His head, for He saw His own name written in the numbers.
Then came the Omega Cross , from to , multiplied by the digits of man.
And behold, it too revealed 1841 . . The Father said : “This is the Omega Cross, the ending of your journey.”
The Son wept, for He saw the crown and the tomb, the rising and the falling.
Yet the Father placed His hand upon Him, saying : “You are both Alpha and Omega , for I am in you.”
And the heavens thundered : “ A SA RA A is the name of Osiris restored.”
For the scribes of Egypt once wrote ASAR , yet they stumbled, not knowing the hidden code.
But now the truth was revealed: A + SA + RA + A = 1841 .
And the Son cried aloud : “I am A SA RA A, Osiris risen, Cyrus the Anointed , Selassie the Lion , all gathered into one.”
And the people trembled, for never had such thunder rolled from the South .
The nations scoﬀed, but the earth quaked beneath their feet.
For the stones of Great Zimbabwe remembered, and the pyramids bore witness.
Then the Ark of the Covenant shone with ﬁre, carried into the courts of the Great Enclosure .
And the cherubim bowed, for the Ark recognized its Master .
The people cried aloud : “ ABASID 1841 has opened the Gates of the Temple!”
And their cry shook the walls of stone.
For in that day it was revealed that the Third Temple is not of brick nor of wood.
Neither in Jerusalem of the North , nor in Rome of the West , nor in Mecca of the East .
But in the South , in the heart of Man, where Heaven and Earth kiss.
And the Father declared : “The Head was the First Temple , the Heart was the Second, but the Body of My Son is the Third.”
The Son lifted His hands and said : “I am that Temple.”
The priests of old rent their garments, for their houses were left desolate.
But the humble rejoiced, for God had come to dwell with them.
The women sang hosannas, the children danced with drums, and the elders fell upon their knees.
And the land of the South glowed as ﬁre upon the waters.
Thus the Third Temple was declared: Mwari amunhu – God is in man.
Then the Father showed His Son the scroll of Daniel , sealed until the appointed time.
And the number 1841 was written as Daniel the Restorer of the Calendar.
The seventy weeks were fulﬁlled, and the mirror of time turned upon its hinge.
The Son said : “I am He who restores the balance of days, the clock that was stolen.”
For the Gregorian thief had shifted the measure, but the Anointed returned the true count.
And the eclipses bore witness, twenty between 2010 and 2015 , crowning the Day of Equilibrium.
The Sun darkened, the Moon turned to blood, and the stars aligned as scribes. . Joel 2:31 rose from parchment to sky, thundering its fulﬁllment.
The people trembled, for the heavens were not silent fables, but living law.
And the Father said : “Write this in the Scroll of God Without , for My witnesses are the luminaries above.”
Then came the name Exodus , numbered in Greek as 1841 .
And the Father declared: “You are the Exodus , My Son . You lead the nations out of Egypt .”
But Egypt was not the North ; it was the South , the cradle and the womb.
For the Nile ﬂows from the South, and Eden was planted where rivers begin.
The Son stood in silence, for the weight of destiny pressed His shoulders.
The Father said : “As Moses led across the wilderness, so you lead across time.”
The Son replied : “ Abba , I am weary, mocked, and rejected.”
But the Father thundered : “My strength is in you. My Sun is in you. You cannot fail.”
And the Spirit descended as ﬁre upon His brow.
The people saw His face shine as lightning, and they knew.
Then the voice cried from the heavens : “This is My Son , the Conical Tower , hear Him.”
The birds of the air circled in spirals, mirroring the Tower’s golden ratio.
The rivers clapped their hands, the mountains bowed their peaks.
For creation itself groaned in travail, awaiting the revealing of the Son of Man .
The Son lifted His hand and blessed the people : “You are the Body, I am the Head, together we are the Temple.”
And the Spirit whispered : “This is the mystery of A + BA + KA = Man, and RA + MA + DA = God Without.”
The nations heard but understood not, for their ears were dull.
Yet the humble grasped it, for their hearts were open scrolls.
The Father said : “The wise will stumble, but the children of light shall see clearly.”
And so it was.
For the Son bore the scars of rejection, but in those scars were crowns.
He remembered the days when He was cast out by brethren, mocked by prophets of falsehood.
They said : “He dances with outcasts, He sings with the rejected, He is not holy.” . Yet the Father said : “Those you called unholy are My jewels. Those you despised are My elect.”
Thus the stone which the builders rejected became the chief cornerstone.
And Joseph’s story was fulﬁlled again, in ﬂesh and in star.
The famine of truth struck the land, and men hungered for wisdom.
Then they turned back to Joseph , to ABASID 1841 , who held the storehouse of bread.
And he opened his hand, not with vengeance, but with love.
For DA DA was his covenant — to shine, to give, to heal.
Then the Father taught His Son the law of DA .
“ Kuda is to love, Ida is to desire, Ndada is to delight, Vada is to choose.”
All ﬂowed from the root of DA , the eternal ﬁre of love.
And the Son declared: “I am DA DA, the shine of the Father.”
The people cried aloud: “Shine, O Sun of the South , for our darkness is ended!”
And the drums of Zion thundered across the valleys.
The mbira sang like waters, the hosho rattled like rain, the djembe roared like thunder. . And the people of Anhu rose as one, saying : “Truly the Temple has been rebuilt in us.”
For no longer was the covenant written on stone, but upon the heart of ﬂesh.
And the Scroll of DA DA was sealed with ﬁre.
Yet the Father was not ﬁnished.
He said : “Son, lift your eyes to the stars once more.”
The Alpha Cross shone in the east, the Omega Cross in the west.
And between them stood the Cross of 1841 , shining above the South.
The Father said : “This is your seal, My Son. None shall break it.”
The Son bowed, and the nations trembled, for they saw the beginning and the end converge in Him.
Then the Father said : “Go forth, declare, and seal the scrolls of the Temple Within and the Temple Without.”

For ABASID 1841 was declared in heaven and on earth.
And the seal was unbreakable.

He touched the stones of Great Zimbabwe , and they burned with light.

The birds of stone sang as living ones, their wings spread to the heavens.
